rows.workflow_type: skill/package reference for scientific and clinical research workflows
rows.real_life_job: Support biomedical or clinical research work such as clinical trial lookup, variant interpretation, drug safety review, clinical documentation, and treatment-plan drafting with human oversight.
rows.input_contract: Research or clinical source data such as VCF files, clinical databases, trial records, FDA/ClinVar/COSMIC/ClinicalTrials.gov references, EHR-like signals, imaging data, and documentation inputs.
rows.output_artifact: Clinical or research report, database-backed summary, documented analysis, treatment-plan draft, or review-ready clinical research artifact.
rows.trigger: Use when a Codex/ECC catalog needs reusable scientific or clinical research skill examples with database-backed workflows and explicit skill documentation.
rows.tools_or_sources: ClinicalTrials.gov, ClinVar, ClinPGx, COSMIC, FDA databases, cBioPortal, Monarch, PubMed-style paper lookup, clinical reports, treatment plans, document tools, scientific Python packages.
rows.validation_gate: Check source provenance, database identity, workflow fit, source freshness, and require human review for clinical interpretation or treatment implications.
rows.human_review_boundary: Required before final medical, clinical, treatment, safety, or patient-specific conclusions.
rows.safety_boundary: Do not make independent diagnosis, treatment, legal, compliance, engineering, or safety conclusions; treat outputs as research or review drafts only.
rows.codex_package_relevance: High. README states the repo contains many SKILL.md-based skills, works with Codex-compatible skill hosts, and includes clinical research and healthcare AI categories.
rows.what_to_copy: Skill-pack structure, domain category taxonomy, database-backed workflow prompts, source provenance expectations, and clinical documentation/treatment-plan draft boundaries.
rows.what_to_ignore: Do not copy claims that the package itself is a healthcare administration/referral workflow; it is broader scientific and clinical research infrastructure.
rows.tags: healthcare, clinical-research, biomedical, skill-pack, database-lookup, human-review
